summary: Adds explicit --live/--apply gates for AFFiNE canvas transform and layout plans.
reason: Canvas live mutation needs backed-up, confirmed, integrity-checked apply paths instead of implicit dry-run output.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/canvaswrite ./internal/cli, go test ./..., go build ./cmd/affine-pp-cli ./cmd/affine-pp-mcp, canvas apply help smoke, which canvas apply smoke, workflow-verify, publish validate, pre-network live gate smokes, and approved live fixture smoke passed. The live smoke wrote 20 Live Zap cards and 28 connectors to AFFiNE doc B6pvUw-r5SSfWKam-wncU, then applied a second transform proof to the hub card with post-apply integrity OK.
